item.title: It is what it is...
item.description:
After two years of being treated as he deserved, tiny octopus said, enough is enough. Just a quick edit. Tiny octopus' former job was a good one, which is why he said he was getting treated as he deserved. The pay was decent, the benefits were good for the corporate world, and the supervisor was a good chap. It was just too good of an opportunity to move to the civil service side with the benefits, union, pension and the PSLF program.
Went from contractor to full on civilian. GS-11 now with an increased step because he was recruited. Pay is about the same, but am now union with much better benefits. And a pension. Woo! Told the tiniers that their dad is now unemployed. At least until Tuesday when he steps onto the base as a CIV instead of a CTR.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: I'm doing the things.
item.description: FP edit: Holy Canolies guys thanks for the support and the love, y'all are way awesome! I'll keep it quick here, but some have asked why I went. Well, I used to be a self employed salesman. Unfortunately, what I sold was illegal (various narcotics) and I was contributing to the delinquency of society. Arrested in 2018 for delivery of controlled substance and possession of felony weight of controlled substance. Given a 5-8 sentence, I did the crime and boy did I do the time. Twas not all bad, learned a bunch of cool stuff about myself and never once dropped the soap. Again, thanks for the love and support. Started my job as a line cook at a badass restaurant in town making more than I probably deserve. Ready to save up some bucks and get myself out of this homeless shelter. My whole experience has been extremely humbling and Im starting over, it's super sweet! Be nice to each other.
item.dc:creator: BlukupReborn

item.title: Images of Note: I dally
item.description:
Soval was scared of humans because they were progressing so quickly.
FUCK THE LEGION!
They knew
Hell yeah
https://linuxmint.com/ * Free * Open Source * Extremely easy to use * Plenty of compatible software, including big names. * Steam with Proton allows you to play PC Games (like with SteamOS on Steam Dead). * Ubuntu Based (dead easy) * Three different flavours for different computer capabilities. Because fuck subscriptions for Windows 12.
:o
:C
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also doing a Q and A, come ask here: https://forms.gle/PjXAXxLVcA7iGSvz7
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: My English Wife was homesick, so I built her a traditional English Pub for her birthday…
item.description:
How it started…as a workshop/catchall storage space
A blank canvas…
Levelling the floors as best as I can ( without tearing them all up…I’m on a budget)
Rotten crossbeams that are too low…( replaced with cedar and lifted 6 inches)
Pine 2x4s and insulation ( don’t know why I took the picture or why I’m posting it…)
New lifted crossbeams and insulated walls
Painted the outside…
And the front ( Don’t worry, I added two more coats…)
First time I’ve ever put up drywall ( and it shows) in my defence, the structure was over 80 yrs old and didn’t have one true corner)
Bought $100 bar on marketplace
Starting to get there…
Optics and ?
First pint…
Lights , mirror and Scampi fries
Front is done ( including the cctv which is a very traditional touch for an authentic English pub)
Comfortable chair, roaring fire and the Pub’s first regular…
Ready for the grand opening
Nearly there….
Table for two?
And a table for four
Welcome to the Mutt and Roses ( Ontario, Canada)
item.dc:creator: hoistedbymyownpetard

item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
i'd be a little intimidated tbh... greetings online friends
po-tay-toes
british acting truly is top notch
but where do they get water?
those ears
i would die for Miss Peanut
it's never too early
better puncture all the golf cart tires you see just to be safe
i used to do this, have relaxed a little
we've all done this
tough to beat the Turtles w/ Vanilla Ice
finally
so 2 is the limit
damn, i only have 226 litres of dirty water
mmm hmm
who's
please don't look at any other memes gang
that's it for me... have a great weekend, gang!!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Well said, it's disgusting that it needs to be heard, but it does.
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: New Year’s Resolution: Learn more about my mom
item.description: Sorry if this post is too serious. She passed away shortly after this image, in 2009, after being the victim of a murder-suicide. For so long, I subconsciously viewed her as some mythical figure and even forgot I had the capacity to ask questions about her. I am now 21, and in 2024 I am going to have deep conversations with my family and those who knew her about who she was in life
item.dc:creator: naturalselectn

item.title: Learning how to smile again... my 1st before pic is to disgusting to show
item.description:
Trying them on before surgery
Right after surgery. Realizing i dont know how to smile showing teeth or smiling at all after years of covering face ( hence the beard mustache hiding it )
Still learning ... still very painful
The 1st smile i had in decades i was proud of ... im so lucky i was able to afford it. Being able to smile changes every moment of your life. I was so scared to do it ( phobia of dentist and being put under ) it was so worth it ... just cant wait to eat solid food again ... please dont hate to much for selfies. And please take care of your mouth it fucking sucks going through this. Just dont hesitate to ends justify the means
item.dc:creator: Leoso0

item.title: The joy of winter operations in the airline business.
item.description: A coworker and fellow Aircraft Maintenance Engineer in Edmonton shared this to me today and gave me permission to share on Imgur. It was -52c last night when the crew had to push out a couple of planes. (EDIT: I went with -52c because my buddy put that into the video. After checking yesterdays official weather, it was about -45c with wind chill, which affects skin but not the metal on the planes. It's still too damn cold). Everything needs to be well coordinated because leaving the hangar door open for too long will cause pipes to freeze and burst. As you can see from all of the gear that he is putting on, it takes a lot to be outside and working on the planes. The fog is caused by the rapid temperature change as its about 20c inside...a 70-ish degree temperature change. The next time that you are flying remember that there is a team of highly skilled people trying to keep the planes safe while trying hard not to get frost bite. Front Page Edit: Thanks for the updoots! I was told that it was -52c up in Edmonton, but it was actually closer to -37c with the wind chill of -45 last night. The -52 was in the actual video, so I went with that. The wind chill is important to know so that you keep your skin covered to avoid freezing it and getting frost bite. I am not the author of the video, it was the guy in the video who shot it, so I am going by what he said. Stay warm fellow aviation peeps working out on the ramp in this cold! Here is the guy in the video's (Aaron) IG account: https://www.instagram.com/adrenaline_junkies_adventures/?igsh=MWh4bWIyMXd1ZTFlOQ%3D%3D&utm_source=qr
item.dc:creator: Travelcedric

item.title: TheFreePizzaAngels are here!
item.description:
Hi everyone, we are TheFreePizzaAngels! Today we're going to send food to Imgurians in need. Come join us, either with help or with a request. It's appreciated if you read the post before requesting :)
If you want to make a request, please: - Have an active account *with more than just pizza requests* - Wait at least a full month after receiving help before asking for help again - Limit your (fulfilled) requests to no more than 3 times per 6 months We will only fulfill one grocery order per Imgurian.
Wanna be a Pizza Angel? There are two easy ways to help someone: 1) Reply to a request, message the user to set up an order, and mention @OP when it's on its way, or 2) contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll send the food for you! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
Any questions about being a Pizza Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 5:30pm central/23:30 GMT
Need help enabling messages? See: https://imgur.com/gallery/pylSPhl
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area.
12,637 meals since we started 795 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Pie tally: 1236 Kicking it off and 2nd by Pizza Angel @possumly 1244 3rd by Pizza Angel @NoRoutesFound 214 4th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 237 5th, 6th, and 7th by Pizza Angel @whitebbwolf 255 8th by Pizza Angel @RocMage 300 9th by Pizza Angel @grim42 304 10th and EDGAR MARTINEZ by Pizza Angel @gueerk 305 12th, 13th, and 14th by Pizza Angel @AyatollahBahloni 309 15th and 16th by Pizza Angel @whitebbwolf 310 17th by Pizza Angel @whitebbwolf 312 18th by Pizza Angel @tripleacattery 320 19th by Pizza Angel @ChaoticAtmosphere 321 20th, 21st, and 22nd by Pizza Angel @RocMage 332 MICHAEL JORDAN by Pizza Angel @thequicksilver 343 KEN GRIFFEY JR by Pizza Angel @grim42 344 25th and 26th by Pizza Angel @grim42 346 27th by Pizza Angel @ChaoticAtmosphere 355 28th and 29th by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 357 30th, 31st, and 32nd by Pizza Angel @MorganVPI 415 33rd by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams 425 34th by Pizza Angel @Gigbit 435 35th, 36th, 37th, and 38th by THE MAN THE MYTH THE LEGEND @MrPuckett 438 39th by Pizza Angel @ChaoticAtmosphere 448 40th by Pizza Angel @grim42 449 41st by Pizza Angel @plantaindreams 457 LIFE, THE UNIVERSE, AND EVERYTHING by Pizza Angel @RocMage 510 43rd by Pizza Angel @gablestout 521 44th and 45th by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 623 46th by Pizza Angel @grim42 ... Grocery count: 218 1st by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 416 2nd by Grocery Angel @RocMage 503 3rd by Grocery Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 535 4th by Grocery Angel @NoRoutesFound ... Alright everyone that's it for @OP Today we sent out 46 meals Filled 4 huge grocery orders That's 12,683 meals since we started 799 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude
